title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Honda Motorcycle India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Honda Motorcycle India
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
